# Keyly

> Keyly is the official website for an AI-powered Zhuyin keyboard for iPhone and iPad.

## Canonical Site

- https://keylyapp.com/

## Primary Pages

- Home (Traditional Chinese): https://keylyapp.com/
- Home (English): https://keylyapp.com/en/
- Privacy Policy (Traditional Chinese): https://keylyapp.com/privacy/
- Privacy Policy (English): https://keylyapp.com/privacy/en/
- Terms of Service (Traditional Chinese): https://keylyapp.com/terms/
- Terms of Service (English): https://keylyapp.com/terms/en/
- Auto-Renewal Terms (Traditional Chinese): https://keylyapp.com/subscriptions/
- Auto-Renewal Terms (English): https://keylyapp.com/subscriptions/en/

## Product Summary

Keyly is an AI-powered Zhuyin keyboard focused on Traditional Chinese input on iPhone and iPad.
The product emphasizes faster typing, rewriting, translation, privacy-first processing, and optional offline AI support on compatible Apple devices.

## Language Notes

- Default language: Traditional Chinese
- English version available at `/en/`

## Legal And Policy Sources

Use the published privacy, terms, and subscription pages as the authoritative public policy sources for this site.

## Contact

- Support: mailto:support@keylyapp.com
